commander_class-20000010: "It's obvious from your immaculate clothes are that you've been slacking. Here, roll around in this mud pit."

commander_class-20000099: Hide your thoughts and embody your desire.
commander_class-20000019: Open your heart and usher in a new year with your Dolls. A lifetime can pass in just the blink of an eye, but memories endure. They will be preserved and passed on.

commander_class-40000023: Griffin Memories Star Collection Stage Reward
commander_class-20000024: There were once a group of people who let children dream of the stars and taught them about loss and cherishing what they had.
commander_class-40000024: Griffin Memories Star Collection Stage Reward
commander_class-20000025: It's certainly tough to experience hardship in times of turmoil, but it's even more commendable to seek harmony in times of peace. Only children would fight tooth and nail over such things; grown-ups would just take it all!
commander_class-20000026: The greater the glory, the greater the responsibility. Fight – for the sake of protecting all that you have.
commander_class-20000027: Will putting on loose and retro clothing bring one back to the olden days? I hope not � that�d be bad.
commander_class-20000028: Express your joy on this festive occasion in your own way! Even if you know nothing about the origin or purpose of the festival, you still get a holiday!

commander_class-20000030: We work in the dark to serve the light, but it is not our place to judge whether the light is in the right.

commander_class-20000033: Trade-offs have to be made in war. Don't hold onto someone you must let go.
commander_class-20000034: If it would ensure that evil was eliminated, then we would gladly welcome death for the benefit of the public.
commander_class-20000035: Even if your eyes are currently shut, miracles are still taking place somewhere...
commander_class-40000035: Girls' Frontline x Lawson Offline Collaboration Exchange
commander_class-20000036: Your life is a sprawling expo, Commander. Bring a conclusion to your journeys thus far, and then continue with the next leg of your travels.
commander_class-40000036: Protocol Assimilation Special Supply Login Reward
commander_class-20000037: Formal wear custom-made by two world-class fashion designers. Its beauty will surely find its way to the destined one.
commander_class-20000038: War is like a performance, to fall is to exit the stage.
commander_class-20000039: The sky is dark, the silver moon is full, and the lights of a vast amusement park and joyous music welcome you as you arrive in this street of beasts. commander_class-20000040: The memories of that day are a melody that will never fade, and the warmth of those ten fingers laced together are a treasure to be hoarded as long as I live.
commander_class-20000041: No matter what dust clouds the wheels of history churn up, it will never be able to cover up their will.
commander_class-20000042: When the roar of mecha thunders through the sky, the only thing that stands between them and those who cannot fight are the wings of the Griffin.
commander_class-10000043: Dream Hidden In The Blue Sky
commander_class-20000043: Carrying the toys which bear their youthful dreams, that child gazing into the sky steps into a boundless world of blue.
commander_class-20000044: The pieces of war slowly fall, and a massive steel beast soars into the air at the end of a plume of roaring flames. In that endless sky, none dare claim that these top guns are not knights.
commander_class-20000045: The true elite of the mercantile class often carry themselves with style. Their disposition is 50% keenness and 50% sternness.
commander_class-20000046: Bring me to a party in Dreamland. When you awaken, those who shared your drunken stupor will still be by your side.
commander_class-20000047: Adrift in the boundless universe under the watchful gaze of countless stars, all is silent save for the sound of breathing through the oxygen tank... Do we stop here? No, there are surely more stunning sights that have never been seen before somewhere out there. Facing the unknown with courage - Warp 4!
commander_class-20000048: As you stand at the pinnacle of humanity, they shall descend and crown you as the ultimate weirdo.
commander_class-20000049: With a cool breeze blowing in your face and warm sunlight shining on the earth, work up a sweat to keep the morning dew company.
commander_class-20000050: A bead of sweat slides down as the air in your lungs grow hot. Energy is infused into your blood with every punch... Your body may have reached its limit, but the way of martial arts is a lot more profound than this! Put everything at stake; conquer the greatest peaks!
commander_class-20000051: Into the mysterious bay, through the ferocious storm. Singing boisterous songs as we sail the waves, pointing our swords at our enemies... Listen up, sailors! Drink this bottle of rum, then let's raise the sails, weigh anchor, and search for the next treasure trove!
commander_class-20000052: A hat with a brimstone flame that can allegedly fend off evil spirits. "Where do sinners go upon death? Not Heaven, where angels fly, but Hell, where brimstones burn."
commander_class-20000053: Dazzled by the lights, drunk on dreams, immersed in the music... Spend this unforgettable night with everyone who cherishes you.
commander_class-20000054: Traversing dangerous mountains and rivers, venturing deep into barren wastelands, and searching for lost civilizations in island jungles filled with cobwebs and reptiles - listen, this is an adventure game only for the courageous. Are you ready to join? Great, then let's go!
commander_class-10000055: When the Lanterns are First Lit
commander_class-20000055: Brilliant light, clinking glasses. Friendship, intoxication, and even shrewd hunting are all quietly obscured by the flurry of skirts amidst a buoyant scene of jubilation.
commander_class-20000056: Tis the white snow clinging to bows and blades, the black clouds pressing down on the rampart... Before heading into battle, remember to bury your fear deep in your heart and carry your mission upon your shoulders.
commander_class-20000057: Want to watch some cooking videos to boost your appetite while dining? Want to feast your visual module as well while your gustatory module is savoring your food? commander_class-20000058: On New Year's Eve, the base is cleaned and decorated with New Year paintings and couplets. In this captivating sea of red, the Dolls have all made preparations for the coming celebration - which includes a New Year outfit sewn for you stitch by stitch!

commander_class-20000060: Maple leaves seem to flutter where a sword's might can reach. Through this, one may appreciate the beauty of eternity in the changing of seasons with the passage of time.
commander_class-20000062: Out with the old and in with the new. It's time to take up the scepter of the new year and learn the rhythm of life through dance.
commander_class-20000063: Just strolling through the streets like this? Of course you can. Just remember to follow the latest tech-inspired fashion trends, prepare for unpredictable weather... and maybe carry a few extra weapons for self-defense.
commander_class-20000064: Becoming the focus of the big anniversary party and imparting joy and energy to everyone is your truest wish.
commander_class-20000065: This isn't a grand celebration, but an exclusive gesture of thanks for you. May the warm and peace from the rear heal your frazzled nerves.
commander_class-20000066: "Are you ready? It's time to pack up your memories, Commander. Time to set out once again toward that unknown horizon."
commander_class-20000067: Banish all the bad luck and gloom of the previous year with the most vibrant merriment and the brightest colors!
commander_class-20000068: Whether in the city, the wilderness, the snowfields or the desert... This is a mission which only you can complete.
